title: Articles (a / an / the)
short_description: a, an, the — qaysi biri va qachon ishlatilishi.
description:
Inglizcha 3 ta article bor:

- **a** — undosh tovush bilan boshlangan so'z oldidan (*a book*)
- **an** — unli tovush bilan (*an apple*)
- **the** — aniq predmet (*the book on the table*)

rules.title: Indefinite articles: a / an
rules.formula: a + consonant sound, an + vowel sound
rules.explanation: a/an birinchi marta zikr qilingan, bitta predmet uchun. Tanlov tovush bo'yicha, harf bo'yicha emas.
rules.tips:
Diqqat tovushga, harfga emas:
- an hour (/aʊə/ unli tovush) ✓
- a university (/juː/ undosh tovush) ✓

rules.title: Definite article: the
rules.explanation: the — gap qiluvchi va tinglovchi ikkalasi biladigan aniq predmet uchun. Yagona predmetlar (the sun, the moon) uchun ham ishlatiladi.

examples.sentence: The book on the table is mine.

title: Comparatives and Superlatives
short_description: Bigger, biggest — taqqoslash shakllari.

rules.title: Short adjectives (1 syllable)
rules.explanation: 1 bo'g'inli sifatlarga -er/-est qo'shiladi.
rules.tips:
- big → bigger → the biggest (oxirgi undosh ikki marta)
- nice → nicer → the nicest (e bo'lsa faqat -r/-st)
- happy → happier → the happiest (y → i)

examples.sentence: My house is bigger than yours.

rules.title: Long adjectives (2+ syllables)
rules.explanation: 2 va undan ortiq bo'g'inli sifatlar uchun more / the most.
rules.common_mistakes:
❌ This is more bigger.
✓ This is bigger.

❌ She is beautifuler.
✓ She is more beautiful.

title: First Conditional
short_description: If + Present, will + V1 — real kelajak shart.
description: Birinchi turdagi shart gaplar — real, mumkin bo'lgan kelajak.

rules.title: Structure
rules.formula: If + Present Simple, Subject + will + V1
rules.explanation: Shart real va kelajakda yuz berishi mumkin. If bandida Present Simple, asosiy gapda will.
rules.common_mistakes:
❌ If it will rain, I will stay home.
✓ If it rains, I will stay home. (if bandida will yo'q)

examples.sentence: If it rains, I will stay home.
If you study, you'll pass the exam.
I will help you if you need it.

title: Modal Verbs: can / could
short_description: Imkoniyat va so'rov: I can, could you...
description: Can va could — qobiliyat va xushmuomalalik uchun.

rules.title: Can — ability and possibility
rules.explanation: can — hozirgi qobiliyat. Inkor: can't (cannot).

rules.title: Could — past ability and polite requests
rules.explanation: could — o'tgan qobiliyat yoki xushmuomalalik so'rovi. Could you... — Can you...'dan xushmuomalaroq.

examples.sentence: I could run fast when I was young.

title: Plural Nouns
short_description: Ko'plik shakli: -s, -es, irregular.

rules.title: Regular plurals (-s, -es, -ies)
rules.explanation: Ko'pchilik otlarga -s qo'shiladi. -ch/-sh/-x/-s/-ss bilan tugaganlarga -es. Undosh + y → ies.

rules.title: Irregular plurals
rules.explanation: Ba'zi otlarning ko'plik shakli boshqacha.
rules.tips:
Eng muhim irregular ko'pliklar:
- child → children
- man → men
- woman → women
- foot → feet
- tooth → teeth
- mouse → mice

title: There is / There are
short_description: Bor / Mavjud — biror narsa borligini bildirish.
description:
**There is** va **there are** — biror joyda nimadir borligini aytish uchun ishlatiladi. O'zbekchada 'bor' ma'nosida.

- **There is** + yakka ot (bitta narsa)
- **There are** + ko'plik ot (bir nechta narsa)

rules.title: Affirmative (tasdiq)
rules.formula: There is + singular  /  There are + plural
rules.explanation: 'There is' qisqa shakli — there's. 'There are' qisqa shakli yo'q (faqat yozma matnda 'there're ko'rinishi mumkin).
rules.tips:
Joy belgilari bilan ishlatiladi:
- in the room — xonada
- on the table — stolda
- under the chair — stul ostida
- next to the door — eshik yonida

examples.sentence: There is a book on the table.
There are five chairs in the room.
There's a cat in the garden.

rules.title: Negative and questions
rules.formula: There isn't + singular  /  Is there + singular?
rules.explanation: Inkor: there is not (isn't), there are not (aren't). Savol: Is/Are there...?

examples.sentence: Is there a hotel near here?

title: Adverbs of Frequency
short_description: always, usually, often, sometimes, never — tez-tezlik ravishlari.
description:
Tez-tezlik ravishlari — qancha tez-tez biror narsa qilinishini bildiradi. Asosan Present Simple bilan ishlatiladi.

Tarkibi (yuqoridan pastga — eng tez-tezdan eng kamigacha):
- **always** — har doim (100%)
- **usually** — odatda (90%)
- **often** — ko'pincha (70%)
- **sometimes** — ba'zan (50%)
- **rarely** — kamdan-kam (20%)
- **never** — hech qachon (0%)

rules.title: Position in sentence
rules.formula: Subject + frequency adverb + Verb  (be bilan: Subject + be + frequency)
rules.explanation:
Asosiy fe'l bilan: ravish fe'ldan oldin keladi.
'Be' fe'li bilan: ravish 'be' dan keyin keladi.
rules.tips:
Gap boshida bo'lishi mumkin (asosan 'sometimes', 'usually', 'often'):
- Sometimes I go to the park.
- Usually we eat at 7.
rules.common_mistakes:
❌ I go always to school by bus.
✓ I always go to school by bus.

❌ She is never late.
✓ She is never late. (be bilan to'g'ri)

examples.sentence: I always drink coffee in the morning.
examples.translation: Men ertalab har doim qahva ichaman.

examples.sentence: She usually goes to bed at 11.

title: Passive Voice
short_description: Passiv ovoz — kim bajarganidan ko'ra nima qilinganligi muhim.
description: Passive Voice harakat predmetga qaratilganda ishlatiladi. Misol: 'The book was written by Tolstoy' — kitob muhimroq, kim yozgani emas.

rules.title: Present Simple Passive
rules.explanation: to be (hozirgi) + asosiy fe'lning 3-shakli (past participle).

rules.title: Past Simple Passive
rules.explanation: to be (o'tgan: was/were) + V3.

examples.sentence: The houses were built last year.

title: Prepositions of Place
short_description: in, on, under, at — joy bildiruvchi predloglar.
description: Predloglar — narsalarning joylashishini bildirish uchun ishlatiladi. Eng asosiy 3 tasi: **in**, **on**, **at**.

rules.title: In / On / At
rules.explanation:
- **in** — yopiq joy ichida (in the room, in the box)
- **on** — yuza ustida (on the table, on the wall)
- **at** — aniq nuqta (at home, at school, at the door)
rules.tips:
Maxsus joylar:
- at home (uyda — predlog yo'q!)
- at work (ishda)
- at school (maktabda)
- in bed (yotoqda)
- in hospital (kasalxonada)

examples.sentence: The book is on the table.
The cat is in the box.

rules.title: Other place prepositions
rules.formula: under / next to / behind / in front of / between
rules.explanation: Boshqa muhim predloglar joylashishni aniqroq bildiradi.

examples.sentence: The ball is under the chair.
My car is next to the house.
The garden is behind the house.
A man is in front of the door.
The bank is between the shop and the cafe.

title: Possessive Pronouns
short_description: My, your, his, her, our, their.
description: Egalik olmoshlari va ulardan keyin keladigan ot.

rules.title: Possessive adjectives
rules.explanation: my, your, his, her, its, our, their — keyin ot keladi.

title: Personal Pronouns
short_description: I, you, he, she, it, we, they — shaxs olmoshlari.
description:
Inglizchada 7 ta shaxs olmoshi bor. Bu olmoshlar gap egasi sifatida ishlatiladi.

- **I** — men
- **You** — siz/sen (yakka va ko'plik bir xil!)
- **He** — u (erkak)
- **She** — u (ayol)
- **It** — u (jonsiz narsa, hayvon)
- **We** — biz
- **They** — ular

rules.title: Subject pronouns as gap egasi
rules.explanation: Inglizcha gapda ega doim bo'lishi shart. O'zbek tilida ega tushib qolishi mumkin, lekin inglizchada yo'q.
rules.tips:
Eslatma:
- 'You' yakka va ko'plik bir xil
- 'It' faqat jonsiz narsalar va hayvonlar uchun
- 'I' har doim bosh harf bilan yoziladi (gap o'rtasida ham)
rules.common_mistakes:
❌ Am a student.
✓ I am a student.

❌ Is hot today.
✓ It is hot today.

title: Demonstratives: this, that, these, those
short_description: this/that/these/those — bu, anavi, bular, anavilar.
description:
Demonstrative olmoshlar — biror narsani ko'rsatish uchun ishlatiladi.

Yaqindagi narsalar uchun: **this** (yakka), **these** (ko'plik)

Uzoqdagi narsalar uchun: **that** (yakka), **those** (ko'plik)

rules.title: Yaqin va uzoqdagi narsalar
rules.formula: this/that + Singular Noun  /  these/those + Plural Noun
rules.explanation: this/that — bitta narsa uchun. these/those — bir nechta narsa uchun. this/these — yaqindagi narsalar. that/those — uzoqdagi narsalar.
rules.tips:
Vizual yodlash:
- this 👉 (men yonidagi bitta narsa)
- that 👈 (uzoqdagi bitta narsa)
- these 👇 (men yonidagi ko'p narsa)
- those ↗️ (uzoqdagi ko'p narsa)
rules.common_mistakes:
❌ This are my books.
✓ These are my books. (ko'plik — these)

❌ That books are interesting.
✓ Those books are interesting.

title: Question Words
short_description: What, where, when, who, why, how — savol so'zlari.
description:
Savol so'zlari (Wh-questions) — gap boshida keladi va aniq ma'lumot so'raydi. 'Yes/No' javob talab qilmaydi.

Eng muhim 6 ta: What, Where, When, Who, Why, How

rules.title: Basic question words
rules.explanation: Savol so'zi doim gap boshida. Keyin yordamchi fe'l (do/does/is/are), keyin ega, keyin asosiy fe'l.
rules.tips:
Har biri nima so'raydi:
- **What** — nima? (narsa)
- **Where** — qayerda? (joy)
- **When** — qachon? (vaqt)
- **Who** — kim? (odam)
- **Why** — nega? (sabab)
- **How** — qanday? (usul, holat)

rules.title: How + adjective/adverb
rules.explanation: How so'zi sifat yoki ravish bilan birikib, aniq miqdor yoki daraja so'raydi.
rules.tips:
Foydali iboralar:
- How much? — qancha? (sanab bo'lmaydigan)
- How many? — qancha? (sanab bo'ladigan)
- How old? — necha yoshda?
- How long? — qancha uzun/vaqt?
- How often? — qanchalik tez-tez?

examples.sentence: How many books do you have?

title: Future Continuous
short_description: Kelajakdagi muayyan paytda davom etadigan harakat — will be + V-ing

rules.title: Affirmative form
rules.explanation: Used for an action that will be in progress at a specific time in the future.
rules.explanation_uz: Kelajakning ma'lum bir lahzasida davom etayotgan bo'ladigan harakatni bildiradi.
rules.tips: Ko'pincha 'at this time tomorrow' kabi vaqt ifodalari bilan ishlatiladi.
rules.common_mistakes: Future continuous'ni oddiy future simple bilan adashtirib yuborish.

examples.sentence: This time tomorrow, I will be flying to London.
examples.translation: Ertaga shu vaqtda men Londonga uchib ketayotgan bo'laman.

examples.sentence: At 8 PM, she will be cooking dinner.
examples.translation: Soat 8da u kechki ovqat tayyorlayotgan bo'ladi.

rules.title: Negative form
rules.explanation: Add 'not' after will.

examples.sentence: They won't be working this weekend.
examples.translation: Ular shu dam olish kunlari ishlamaydi.

title: Future Simple (will)
short_description: Kelajak harakatlar va bashoratlar — will + V1

rules.title: Affirmative form
rules.explanation: Used for predictions, spontaneous decisions, and promises about the future.
rules.explanation_uz: Kelajak haqidagi bashoratlar, to'satdan qaror va va'dalarni bildiradi.
rules.tips: 'will' barcha shaxslar bilan o'zgarmaydi.
rules.common_mistakes: 'will' dan keyin infinitiv 'to' qo'shish xato: 'will to go' emas, 'will go'.

examples.sentence: I think it will rain tomorrow.

examples.translation: Men senga shu ishda yordam beraman.

rules.title: Negative form
rules.explanation: won't = will not.

examples.sentence: She won't be at the meeting tomorrow.

rules.title: Question form
rules.explanation: Put 'will' at the beginning of the sentence.

examples.sentence: Will you come to the party?

title: Going to
short_description: Rejalashtirilgan kelajak harakatlar — am/is/are going to + V1

rules.title: Affirmative form
rules.explanation: Used for plans and intentions decided before the moment of speaking.
rules.explanation_uz: Gaplashishdan oldin qaror qilingan reja va niyatlarni bildiradi.
rules.tips: 'will' bilan farqi: 'going to' — oldindan reja, 'will' — spontan qaror.
rules.common_mistakes: 'going to' dan keyin fe'lning V1 (infinitive) shaklini ishlatmaslik xato.

examples.sentence: I am going to study medicine.
They are going to buy a new house.
examples.translation: Ular yangi uy sotib olishni rejalashtirgan.

rules.title: Negative form
rules.formula: Subject + am/is/are + not + going to + V1
rules.explanation: Add 'not' after am/is/are.

examples.sentence: He isn't going to come to the party.

rules.title: Question form
rules.explanation: Put am/is/are at the beginning of the sentence.
rules.explanation_uz: Savol shaklida am/is/are gap boshiga chiqadi.

examples.sentence: Are you going to travel this summer?
examples.translation: Siz shu yoz sayohat qilishni rejalashtirgansizmi?

title: Past Continuous
short_description: O'tgan paytda davom etayotgan harakat — was/were + V-ing

rules.title: Affirmative form
rules.explanation: Used for an action that was in progress at a specific moment in the past.
rules.explanation_uz: O'tgan paytning ma'lum bir lahzasida davom etayotgan harakatni bildiradi.
rules.tips: I/he/she/it bilan 'was', you/we/they bilan 'were' ishlatiladi.
rules.common_mistakes: 'I was working' ni 'I were working' deb yozish — eng ko'p uchraydigan xato.

examples.sentence: I was watching TV at 8 PM yesterday.
examples.translation: Kecha soat 8da men televizor ko'rayotgan edim.

examples.sentence: They were playing football when it started to rain.
examples.translation: Yomg'ir boshlanganda ular futbol o'ynayotgan edi.

rules.title: Negative form
rules.explanation: Negative form adds 'not' after was/were.
rules.tips: wasn't = was not, weren't = were not
rules.common_mistakes: 'I didn't was working' kabi noto'g'ri shakl ishlatish.

examples.sentence: She wasn't sleeping when I called.
examples.translation: Men qo'ng'iroq qilganimda u uxlamayotgan edi.

rules.title: Question form
rules.explanation: To form a question, put was/were at the beginning.
rules.explanation_uz: Savol shaklida was/were gap boshiga chiqadi.

title: Past Perfect
short_description: Boshqa o'tmishdagi harakatdan oldin tugagan harakat — had + V3

rules.title: Affirmative form
rules.explanation: Used for an action that happened before another action in the past.
rules.explanation_uz: O'tmishdagi boshqa bir harakatdan oldin sodir bo'lgan harakatni bildiradi.
rules.tips: Ko'pincha 'before' yoki 'after' bilan birga ishlatiladi.
rules.common_mistakes: Ikkita o'tmish harakat ketma-ketligini ko'rsatish kerak bo'lmaganda past perfect ishlatish.

examples.sentence: She had finished her work before I arrived.
examples.translation: Men kelishimdan oldin u ishini tugatgan edi.

examples.sentence: They had already left when we got there.
examples.translation: Biz u yerga borganimizda ular allaqachon ketgan edi.

rules.title: Negative form
rules.explanation: Add 'not' after had.

examples.sentence: I hadn't seen that movie before last night.
examples.translation: Men kechagi tundan oldin bu filmni ko'rmagan edim.

title: Present Perfect
short_description: O'tmishni hozirgi vaqt bilan bog'laydi — have/has + V3

rules.title: Affirmative form
rules.explanation: Used for actions that happened at an unspecified time before now, or that continue into the present.
rules.explanation_uz: Aniq vaqti aytilmagan, lekin hozirga bog'liq o'tgan harakatlarni bildiradi.
rules.tips: I/you/we/they bilan 'have', he/she/it bilan 'has' ishlatiladi.
rules.common_mistakes: Aniq o'tgan vaqt (yesterday, last week) bilan present perfect ishlatish — bu xato, past simple kerak.

examples.sentence: I have visited Paris three times.
examples.translation: Men Parijga uch marta tashrif buyurganman.

examples.sentence: She has already finished her homework.

rules.title: Negative form
rules.explanation: Add 'not' after have/has.

rules.title: Question form
rules.explanation: Put have/has at the beginning of the sentence.
rules.explanation_uz: Savol shaklida have/has gap boshiga chiqadi.
rules.tips: Ko'pincha 'ever' so'zi bilan ishlatiladi: Have you ever...?

examples.sentence: Have you ever been to Japan?

title: Present Perfect Continuous
short_description: Hozirgacha davom etgan harakat — have/has been + V-ing

rules.title: Affirmative form
rules.explanation: Used for an action that started in the past and is still continuing, emphasizing duration.
rules.explanation_uz: O'tmishda boshlangan va hozir ham davom etayotgan harakatni, davomiyligini ta'kidlab ko'rsatadi.
rules.tips: Ko'pincha 'for' (davomiylik) yoki 'since' (boshlangan nuqta) bilan ishlatiladi.
rules.common_mistakes: Statik fe'llar (know, like, believe) bilan continuous shaklini ishlatish xato.

examples.sentence: I have been studying English for two years.
examples.translation: Men ingliz tilini ikki yildan beri o'rganmoqdaman.

examples.sentence: She has been working here since 2020.

rules.title: Negative form
rules.explanation: Add 'not' after have/has.

examples.sentence: He hasn't been feeling well lately.
examples.translation: U so'nggi paytlarda o'zini yaxshi his qilmayapti.

title: Present Simple
short_description: Hozirgi oddiy zamon — kundalik harakatlar va faktlar uchun.
description:
**Present Simple** zamoni quyidagi vaziyatlarda ishlatiladi:

- Kundalik takrorlanadigan harakatlar (*I work every day*)
- Doimiy faktlar (*The sun rises in the east*)
- Odatlar va xobbi (*She plays tennis*)
- Jadval va vaqt (*The train leaves at 7*)

rules.title: Affirmative form
rules.formula: Subject + V1 (+ s/es for he/she/it) + Object
rules.explanation: Affirmative gaplarda fe'lning birinchi shakli ishlatiladi. He/she/it olmoshlari uchun fe'lga -s yoki -es qo'shiladi.
rules.explanation_uz: Tasdiq gaplarda fe'lning oddiy shakli ishlatiladi. U (he/she/it) bilan -s qo'shiladi.
rules.tips:
- s/es qoidalari:
  * Ko'p fe'llarda -s qo'shiladi: work → works
  * -ch/-sh/-x/-o/-ss bilan tugaganda -es: watch → watches
  * Undosh + y → ies: study → studies
rules.common_mistakes:
❌ He don't work here.
✓ He doesn't work here.

❌ She work in a bank.
✓ She works in a bank.

rules.title: Negative form
rules.explanation: Negative gaplar uchun "do not" (don't) yoki "does not" (doesn't) ishlatiladi. He/she/it uchun "doesn't".
rules.tips: doesn't ishlatilganda asosiy fe'l -s olmaydi.
rules.common_mistakes:
❌ He doesn't works here.
✓ He doesn't work here.

rules.title: Question form
rules.explanation: Savol gaplarda "Do" yoki "Does" gap boshida keladi.
rules.tips: Wh-savollar bilan: What do you do? Where does she live?

title: Present Continuous
short_description: Hozirgi davom etayotgan zamon — ayni shu daqiqada bo'layotgan harakat.
description:
**Present Continuous** ishlatiladi:

- Ayni hozir bo'layotgan harakat (*I'm reading now*)
- Vaqtinchalik holatlar (*She's living with her parents this month*)
- Yaqin kelajak rejalari (*We're meeting tomorrow*)

rules.title: Affirmative: am / is / are + V-ing
rules.explanation: to be (am/is/are) + asosiy fe'lga -ing qo'shiladi.
rules.tips:
- I am → I'm
- He is → He's
- They are → They're

rules.title: Present Simple vs Present Continuous
rules.explanation: Present Simple — doimiy / takrorlanadigan; Present Continuous — hozir / vaqtincha bo'layotgan.
rules.common_mistakes:
❌ I am working in Tashkent every day.
✓ I work in Tashkent every day. (doimiy fakt)

title: Past Simple
short_description: O'tgan zamon — tugagan harakat.
description: **Past Simple** ishlatiladi tugagan, o'tgan voqea uchun. Vaqt belgilari: yesterday, last week, in 2010, ago.

rules.title: Regular verbs (-ed)
rules.explanation: Ko'p fe'llarga -ed qo'shiladi: work → worked, play → played.
rules.tips:
Tovushlash qoidalari:
- /t/ — talked, walked (jarangsizdan keyin)
- /d/ — played, lived (jarangli/unlidan keyin)
- /ɪd/ — wanted, needed (-t/-d dan keyin)

rules.title: Irregular verbs
rules.explanation: Ba'zi fe'llar -ed olmaydi, balki o'zining ikkinchi shakliga ega: go → went, see → saw, eat → ate.
rules.tips:
Eng muhim irregular fe'llar:
- be → was/were
- have → had
- go → went
- do → did
- see → saw
- come → came

rules.title: Negative and questions
rules.explanation: Past Simple savol va inkor uchun did/didn't ishlatiladi. Asosiy fe'l V1 shakliga qaytadi.
rules.common_mistakes:
❌ I didn't went there.
✓ I didn't go there.

title: Have got
short_description: Egalik bildirish: I have got = I have.
description:
**Have got** — egalik bildirish uchun ishlatiladi. Britaniya inglizchasida ko'p, Amerika inglizchasida kamroq.

**Have got** = **have** ma'nosi bir xil, lekin 'have got' ko'pincha hozirgi vaqtdagi egalik uchun ishlatiladi.

rules.title: Have/Has got
rules.explanation: He/she/it bilan 'has got'. Boshqa ega bilan 'have got'. Qisqa shakl: I've got, He's got, She's got.
rules.tips:
Qachon ishlatish:
- Hozirgi egalik: I've got a car.
- Oilaviy aloqalar: She's got two brothers.
- Tana qismlari: He's got blue eyes.
- Kasalliklar: I've got a headache.
rules.common_mistakes:
❌ He have got a dog.
✓ He has got a dog.

❌ I got a problem.
✓ I've got a problem.
